Machine Learning

SUMMARY OF REQUIREMENTS

1. Breadth Courses

Visit the breadth requirement page for more information.

2. Fundamental Courses

Students complete two courses by either taking two courses from group A or one course from group A and one course from group B.

Group

Course ID

Title

ACOMS W4252Introduction to Computational Learning Theory
ACOMS W4771 or COMS W4721 or ELEN 4720[1]Machine Learning OR Machine Learning for Data Science OR Machine Learning for Signals, Information and Data
ACOMS 4776Neural Networks & Deep Learning
BCOMS W4705Natural Language Processing

3. Secondary Courses

Students take 2 courses from the following list, at least one of which must be a 6000-level course.

Course IDTitle
COMS W4111Introduction to Databases
COMS W4772 (E6772)Advanced Machine Learning
COMS E6901Projects in Computer Science (up to 3 points)

PROGRAM PLANNING
